name: chainkit-bitcoin-payment-button
description: Add a "Pay with Bitcoin" button and BIP21 QR code to any WordPress page or post. A free wedge from chainkit — the non-custodial Bitcoin payment processor.
author: chainkit
comment:overrides: @wordpress/scripts 30 ships ts-api-utils@1, which reads TS-internal APIs removed in TypeScript 7 (the Go rewrite). Without this pin a transitive dep resolves typescript@7 and `wp-scripts lint-js` crashes with 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading Intrinsic)'. Pin to the 5.x line.
